pluginDescription: Filter candidate stations by callsign rules with whitelist, blacklist, and regex support.
filterOverviewDesc: One rule per line, evaluated in order — the last matching rule wins. Plain text matches the full callsign exactly; regex syntax (e.g. ^JA) triggers regex matching. Prefix a rule with ! to exclude. The first rule's type sets the default: an include rule defaults to blocking all (whitelist mode); an exclude rule defaults to allowing all (blacklist mode). Lines starting with # are comments.
filterRulesDesc: One rule per line. Examples: ^JA (allow JA prefix), !^BV (exclude BV prefix), BG5DRB (exact match). Leave empty to disable filtering.
filterRulesInvalidRegexSyntax: Line {{line}} has invalid regex syntax — please check the expression.
filterScopeDesc: Choose where the filter rules take effect.
